film.title: Firehouse Dog
film.overview: Rexxx, Hollywood's top canine star, gets lost and is adopted into a shabby firehouse. He teams up with a young kid to get the station back on its feet.

dialogues.dialogue: Man!  Yes! Yes!  How did that happen?  Oh, I'm so proud of you.  Thanks.  Hey, yo, Dog Pound.  Hey, Connor.
and all five local news channels.  We're on!  Please welcome the pride of Engine 55,  Dewey the Wonder Dog and his boy, Shane Fahey.  Go, Shane!
- Too late. - I'm closest.  I'm biggest.  Dogpatch.  Proud home of Engine 55.  May I help you?  There.  Not bad, huh?
